condition: Cannot finalize event coverage for VRAgent (1) because the attached script source is missing (MonoBehaviour fileID 6214257061678146550) and no Interactable m_Calls / UnityEvent wiring is provided in the extracted scene meta. VRAgent (1) is a Player-tag prefab instance and its MonoBehaviour appears disabled via prefab modification (m_Enabled=0 on fileID 6214257061678146550). Since we must not directly act on the test agent/player and we also don't know any public no-arg methods to call, we add a placeholder Trigger that should be replaced once the script methods or m_Calls are known.

Manually invoke AgentBridge.StartServer() to validate network initialization even though Awake() will auto-start when autoStart=1 (MonoBehaviour id=75889659, script guid=936d9149ac1e25949911d561695a271a). Expect: TCP listener starts on 127.0.0.1:6400; safe if already running.

Manually invoke AgentBridge.StopServer() to cover shutdown path (OnDestroy/OnApplicationQuit equivalent) and verify resources are released cleanly after starting (MonoBehaviour id=75889659). Expect: stream/client/listener closed; 'Server stopped' logged; no exception.

KeySocket has KeyUnlockReceiver (MonoBehaviour fileID=746320263, script guid=c87167e8859f9dc4d98e818aab1910b1) which subscribes in Awake() to XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered and runs OnItemInserted() once (hasUnlocked gate). Use this manual trigger ONLY when XRSocketInteractor.selectEntered cannot be naturally fired (e.g., no XRGrabInteractable key available / XR interaction not running in the test harness). Expected: DoorController (fileID=1342851255) Unlock() is invoked once; socketIndicatorRenderer (fileID=864473226) material changes to unlockedMaterial (guid=7c38ca2c8b284d9439e0aeac6916567c).

Manually invoke DrawerController.Toggle() (script guid=181a93ff91c685946b20f54ea877474b, MonoBehaviour fileID=659474796). Drawer has BoxCollider (fileID=659474798) but no Rigidbody; Toggle is normally wired from XRSimpleInteractable.selectEntered, which is not provided here, so trigger it directly to cover Toggle() and let Update() animate toward openLocalPosition/closedLocalPosition computed in Start() using openDistance=0.42 and animationSpeed=5.
After waiting to allow Update() to lerp toward OPEN target for several frames, invoke Toggle() again to cover CLOSE transition and corresponding Debug.Log branch.

Manually invoke LightSwitchController.Toggle() (script guid=afb52d2e54ea1614294036b01b20569f, MonoBehaviour fileID=1618227218). LightSwitch_Room2 has BoxCollider (fileID=1618227216) but no Rigidbody; Toggle is normally wired from XRSimpleInteractable.selectEntered, which is not provided here, so trigger it directly to cover Toggle(): flips isOn, sets controlledLight.enabled (controlledLight fileID=340544673) when non-null, calls UpdateVisual() to swap switchRenderer.sharedMaterial (switchRenderer component fileID=1618227215) between litMaterial/unlitMaterial, and emits Debug.Log for ON state.
Invoke Toggle() a second time to cover the opposite branch/log (OFF state) and verify controlledLight.enabled toggles back and UpdateVisual() swaps to unlitMaterial.

DoorPivot has DoorController (MonoBehaviour fileID=1342851255, guid=df6ed34bdc198f845aeef08129f7eb31) with startLocked=1, openAngle=90, animationSpeed=3. Since door starts locked, first manually call Unlock() so subsequent open/toggle interactions can take effect.
After unlocking, trigger a door state change via DoorController.Toggle() (no parameters). Expect isOpen flips to true and Update() lerps localRotation toward targetOpenRotation.

Room1 has no Rigidbody info and no Collider/EventTrigger/MonoBehaviour info provided yet. Defer manual triggering until child objects/components (especially any MonoBehaviour with m_Calls Interactable events) are provided; then choose the most relevant Interactable UnityEvent (m_Calls) to invoke under appropriate conditions.

LightSwitch_Room1 has BoxCollider (fileID: 1894443797) enabling interaction. MonoBehaviour (fileID: 1894443799, guid: afb52d2e54ea1614294036b01b20569f) is LightSwitchController with serialized refs: controlledLight(fileID: 590520313), switchRenderer(fileID: 1894443796), litMaterial(guid:1529549f84e419e409d02128368bed06), unlitMaterial(guid:25cacebe91df7a9478efb7354f75efdf).
